---
title: "Grisly Grisell, or, The Laidly Lady of Whitburn: A Tale of the Wars of the Roses. 2 vols."
---

## Grisly Grisell, or, The Laidly Lady of Whitburn: A Tale of the Wars of the Roses. 2 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1893
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
